Disqualifying signals: Agencies with fully automated accounting systems; Agencies with dedicated accounting staff

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual vendor invoice tracking and payment scheduling leads to missed payments and cash flow issues.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: Consulting agencies + manual invoice tracking pain + streamlined payment scheduling + manual entry.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual invoice entry and payment schedule generation.

research_summary.notes: The target persona is well-defined, and the identified pain points are significant enough to warrant a solution.
